about.title: About Qiao Fang Technology
about.subtitle: Precision Manufacturing, Connecting the Future
about.intro: Founded in 2016, Kunshan Qiao Fang Electronics Technology Co., Ltd. specializes in R&D and manufacturing of electronic components, precision connectors, and supporting cables. Located in Kunshan, Jiangsu Province, with modern production facilities and a professional R&D team.
about.missionText: Centered on precision manufacturing, providing highly reliable electronic interconnection solutions for global customers.
about.visionText: To become a globally leading supplier of precision connectors and electronic components, driving industry innovation.
about.valuesText: Quality First, Innovation Driven, Customer Oriented, Win-Win Cooperation
